query: "War and Peace" Tolstoy pages Pevear Volokhonsky translation
answer: War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy is translated by Richard Pevear and Larissa Volokhonsky. This translation is highly regarded for its accuracy and style. It is available on Amazon and Barnes & Noble.

results.title: On War & Peace: My Problems With The Pevear & Volokhonsky Translation (Part I) - Tolstoy Therapy
results.snippet: | What are your thoughts on the Pevear and  Volokhonsky translation of Tolstoy’s  War and Peace? I decided about a year ago that I’d like to re-read Tolstoy’s *War and Peace* every summer (this post may help to explain such madness). To remedy a total lack of *War and Peace*, I downloaded the Pevear and Volokhonsky translation onto my Kindle, settled down to read it at the start of a long train journey across the UK, and **turned my Kindle off less than fifteen minutes later**. Drawing on my love for books and a degree in English Literature, I started Tolstoy Therapy in 2012 and have shared the most feel-good, cozy, and beautiful books for over a decade. For more book recommendations, subscribe to Tolstoy Therapy's weekly email to inspire your reading list. Receive the latest Tolstoy Therapy posts in your inbox, as well as other feel-good book recommendations and my book of the month.
